system.notes: A bed-sized capsule — thin mattress, reading lights, a limited-function telecom, flat trideo, climate controls and (sometimes) a simsense player, all activated by inserting a credstick. Amenities are pay-per-use (a local call 1-5¥, telecom ~5¥/hr). Roughly 30¥/night. Security: the cubicle gives those inside Barrier Rating 12 and is locked by a Rating-3 print-scanner maglock; the hotel computer is Rating 4 with Blaster-3 / Trace / Dump-4 IC. Neo-Anarchists' Guide p.49-51, 102.
